title: clematopsis trifida
side_effects: Clematopsis trifida can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues. Ingesting the plant's toxic compounds can lead to nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain, while prolonged exposure may cause headaches and fatigue. The plant's sap can also cause skin blisters and burns if not handled carefully, and its volatile oils may exacerbate asthma or other respiratory conditions. In severe cases, misuse of Clematopsis trifida can even trigger anaphylactic shock or kidney damage.
